data.description: After a remarkable rally on Wednesday, Wall Street experienced a sharp decline on Thursday.

data.title: US Stock Futures Fall, Nikkei Crashes Over 5% As Markets Reel From Trump's Tariff Shock
data.description: U.S. stock futures fell on Thursday night as investors prepared to close a volatile trading week marked by dramatic market swings. Nasdaq-100 futures led declines, dropping 1.26% to 18,251.75, while S&P 500 futures fell 1.04% to 5,247.00 and Dow futures slipped 0.88% to 39,448.00.

data.title: What's Going On With VinFast Auto Stock On Thursday?
data.description: VinFast Auto (VFS) shares are down 1.71% as the company launches the VF 6 SUV in the Philippines and expands its EV ecosystem amid broader market pressure.

data.title: Beyoncé Partnership, Strong Sales And Low China Exposure - Analyst Upgrades Levi Strauss To Buy
data.description: Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE:LEVI) gets a bullish nod from BofA, highlighting its global brand strength, solid first-quarter results, and robust wholesale recovery. With low leverage and limited China risk, LEVI's diversified growth strategy fuel optimism.
